canonical_definition: The ability to correctly align and reference information between visual and textual modalities, ensuring that answers are grounded in the actual content of the image.
papers: CCQA: Generating Question from Solution Can Improve Inference-Time Reasoning inSLMs
ToolSafety: A Comprehensive Dataset for Enhancing Safety inLLM-Based Agent Tool Invocations

definitions.text: The ability to correctly align and reference information between visual and textual modalities, ensuring that answers are grounded in the actual content of the image.
definitions.paper: CCQA: Generating Question from Solution Can Improve Inference-Time Reasoning inSLMs

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to align and integrate semantic information from audio and visual modalities, enabling it to generate descriptions that reflect both modalities even when only audio is available at inference.
definitions.paper: ToolSafety: A Comprehensive Dataset for Enhancing Safety inLLM-Based Agent Tool Invocations

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to correctly map natural language instructions to specific actionable elements or locations on a Graphical User Interface screen.
definitions.paper: MoVa: Towards Generalizable Classification of Human Morals and Values
